arts.ttl: Lazio Travel to Braga With a Depleted Squad as 10 Players Ruled Out
arts.sum: Marco Baroni’s starting lineup against Braga will almost pick itself as Lazio head to Portugal without ten first-team players. Lazio Depleted for Braga Clash The Biancocelesti have already secured direct passage to the Europa League Round of 16 after beating Real Sociedad at home last week. arts.ttl: Lazio Still Confident in Signing Chelsea Midfielder Despite Back-And-Forth Drama
arts.sum: The drama surrounding the transfer saga of Cesare Casadei has now reached its boiling point, as neither Lazio nor Torino is willing to give up on the Chelsea midfielder.
